_meta.opis: 7 scen: hook(KEEP) -> board -> reward_a(CLOSED) -> CIECIE+szzzk -> reward_b(OPEN) -> scratch(MONEY,n2) -> proof -> cta(KEEP,wzor). Klatki produktowe = nano-EDYCJA packshotu (prod-closed/prod-open) z dorysowanym otoczeniem/psem WOKOL realnych pikseli produktu. Produkt STATYCZNY wewnatrz kazdej sceny (first+last z tej samej bazy, rozni sie tylko pies/dlon/rysy). Zmiana stanu pokrywy = CIECIE reward_a->reward_b, NIE animacja.
_meta.kanon_kata: produkt zawsze lezy plasko na podlodze, wierzch widoczny z gory-ukosu; pokrywa (petla) po LEWEJ; wneka po CENTER-RIGHT
_meta.loop_close: cta wraca do kadru i swiatla hooka (corgi na debowej podlodze, kremowa sofa, high-key)

sceny.opis: Corgi cofa lape przed metalowymi obcinaczkami, uszy po sobie (lek). BEZ produktu. Klip z v1/v2 — ZOSTAJE.

kontrakt_produktowy.stan: zamkniety (pokrywa flush nasunieta na wneke, widac tylko czarny wierzch, szew pokrywy i czarna petla po lewej)
kontrakt_produktowy.kat: produkt lezy plasko na podlodze, wierzch z gory-ukosu
must_show: gruba deska, caly wierzch czarny scierny bez rantu

sceny.first_brief_en: Keep the board pixels EXACTLY as in the packshot (thick pale-wood body, whole top black abrasive edge-to-edge, NO rim, lid flush-closed with black loop at left). Add: a bright high-key living room with light-oak floor and a blurred cream sofa; one tri-color corgi sitting just behind the closed board, ears perked, looking down at it curiously.
sceny.last_brief_en: Change ONLY the corgi: it lowers its head and sniffs the closed black surface, ears up. Board stays perfectly identical and still.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: The board stays perfectly still and unchanged, camera static; only the corgi moves slightly - it leans in and sniffs the closed board, tail giving a small wag. No lid movement, no hands.

kontrakt_produktowy.stan: zamkniety, palce dloni ujmuja czarna petle po lewej (gest tuz przed wysunieciem)
kontrakt_produktowy.kat: produkt lezy plasko, wierzch z gory-ukosu
must_show: palce trzymaja czarna petle po lewej

sceny.first_brief_en: Keep the board pixels EXACTLY as in the packshot: the lid is FULLY CLOSED and flush, the treat well is COMPLETELY HIDDEN under the black lid - there is NO open hole, NO round hole, NO open compartment, NO visible well or kibble anywhere; only the unbroken black top, a thin lid seam and the black pull-loop at the left are visible; NO rim. Add: bright high-key living room, light-oak floor, blurred cream sofa; one bare human hand with fingers lightly pinching the black pull-loop at the left corner (the lid has NOT moved); the corgi beside the board lowering its head with interest.
sceny.last_brief_en: Change ONLY: the corgi bows its head a touch closer and the fingers tighten on the loop, poised to pull. Lid still fully closed, board identical and still.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: The board stays perfectly still and closed, camera static; only the corgi dips its head and the fingers settle firmly on the pull-loop, poised - the lid does NOT move yet (the slide happens after the cut). No lid sliding, no lifting.

kontrakt_produktowy.stan: otwarty: SEPARATE czarna pokrywa-deseczka wysunieta w LEWO poza obrys, wneka center-right odkryta z brazowa karma
kontrakt_produktowy.kat: produkt lezy plasko, wierzch z gory-ukosu
must_show: pokrywa jako OSOBNA czarna deseczka wysunieta w lewo poza obrys

sceny.first_brief_en: Keep the board pixels EXACTLY as in the OPEN packshot (thick board, whole top black to the wood edges NO rim; the SEPARATE thinner black lid deck slid LEFT past the outline; the pale wooden well at CENTER-RIGHT). Add: bright high-key living room, light-oak floor, blurred cream sofa; a few brown kibble cubes resting in the wooden well; a bare human hand just releasing the pull-loop and resting nearby; the corgi leaning in toward the open well.
sceny.last_brief_en: Change ONLY: the corgi dips its nose down into the open center-right well toward the kibble; the hand rests still. Board, lid deck (slid left) and well stay perfectly identical and still.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: The board, the slid-out separate black lid deck and the open center-right well all stay perfectly still, camera static; only the corgi lowers its nose into the open well toward the kibble and the hand settles. The lid does NOT move (it is already slid out). No hinge, no rim forms.

kontrakt_produktowy.stan: otwarty; corgi opiera przednie lapy na czarnej powierzchni sciernej / wysunietej pokrywie, pazury drapia; wneka center-right z karma widoczna
kontrakt_produktowy.kat: blizej, produkt plasko, wierzch z gory-ukosu
must_show: przednia lapa corgi na czarnej powierzchni sciernej, pazury na fakturze

sceny.first_brief_en: Keep the board pixels EXACTLY as in the OPEN packshot (whole top black to wood edges NO rim; SEPARATE black lid deck slid LEFT; well at CENTER-RIGHT with brown kibble). Add: bright high-key room, oak floor, blurred cream sofa; the corgi with its tan-and-white front paws pressed on the coarse black abrasive surface (on the slid-out black deck), claws down about to drag; a few faint fine pale-grey scuff streaks already on the black (Image 3 texture, NOT white chalk).
sceny.last_brief_en: Change ONLY: one front paw has dragged down and back leaving fresh fine pale-grey scuff striations (like Image 3), the other front paw lifts to scratch next; well with kibble still at center-right. Board identical and still.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: The board stays perfectly still, camera static; only the corgi's front paws move - one drags down and back across the coarse black abrasive surface with claws, then alternates, leaving fine light-grey scuff streaks. Realistic canine scratching, four legs only. No lid movement, no rim, board does not morph.

kontrakt_produktowy.stan: otwarty; czarny wierzch pokryty gestymi cienkimi jasno-szarymi rysami (dowod), corgi spokojnie opiera lape; wneka center-right z karma
must_show: geste cienkie jasno-szare rysy pazurow na czarnym (nie kreda)

sceny.first_brief_en: Keep the board pixels EXACTLY as in the OPEN packshot (black top to wood edges NO rim; separate black lid deck slid LEFT; well at CENTER-RIGHT with kibble). Add: bright calm room, oak floor, blurred cream sofa; the black abrasive top is now clearly and densely covered in many FINE PALE-GREY diagonal claw-scuff striations across the whole black surface (like Image 3, obvious proof the claws are being filed, NOT white chalk lines) - the scratches must be clearly visible; the corgi resting one tan paw calmly on the edge, content and relaxed.
sceny.last_brief_en: Change ONLY: the framing eases back a touch to show the calm relaxed corgi sitting content beside the scratched board; the fine grey scratches and the open well with kibble stay at center-right. Board identical and still.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: The board stays perfectly still, camera static; only the corgi relaxes - it settles and looks up content beside the scratched board, tail wagging gently. The fine grey scratches and the open center-right well stay unchanged. No lid movement, no rim.

sceny.opis: Corgi za deska (pokrywa wysunieta w lewo, wneka center-right z karma) stuka lapa i patrzy w gore — hero wracajacy do kadru hooka. Klip z v2 = WZOR. ZOSTAJE.

consistency.pies: jeden kanoniczny tri-color corgi (dog-ref) w kazdej scenie
consistency.produkt: ta sama gruba deska; czern do krawedzi bez rantu; pokrywa OSOBNA deseczka wysunieta w lewo (stan otwarty); wneka CENTER-RIGHT; identyczna w scenach tego samego stanu
consistency.stany: board+reward_a = ZAMKNIETY (baza prod-closed); reward_b+scratch+proof = OTWARTY (baza prod-open); cta = otwarty (klip v2)
